# text-tools
> Hash, slugify, count, and case-convert text. A pure-compute rapp-static-mcp.

A **rapp-static-mcp/1.0** catalog — the repo IS the MCP. Each tool binds to a content-addressed compute
cell; a host verifies the cell's sha8 before executing it (verify-before-exec). Only the transport shim runs.

## Run it
```json
{ "command": "node", "args": ["shim.mjs", "--catalog", "https://kody-w.github.io/rapp-static-mcp/examples/text-tools/tools.json"] }
```

## Tools
- `slugify` — Turn text into a url-safe slug.
- `wordcount` — Count characters, words, and lines.
- `sha256` — SHA-256 hash of text (hex).
